title: vendor in new containers/storage
body:
vendor in latest containers/storage which contains a fix for when
a filesystem that overlayfs is on is ENOSPC.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: Looks like the tests aren't hip atm.  Change LGTM, but you may want to add that  you're picking up the pgzip changes in the description.
